title: Taupo Hot Pools Guide for Families — AC Baths vs Thermal Explorer Highway
meta_desc: Discover the best Taupo hot pools for families, compare prices and facilities
intro: Taupo is a haven for families seeking a relaxing soak in natural hot pools, with options ranging from the popular AC Baths to the scenic Thermal Explorer Highway. With prices starting from $10 per person, it's an affordable activity for all. In this guide, we'll compare the top hot pool options around Taupo.

sections.heading: AC Baths Taupo
sections.body: The AC Baths are a top pick for families, offering a range of hot pools, a lazy river, and a dedicated kids' area with a waterslide. Prices start at $14.50 for adults and $8.50 for children aged 5-15, while kids under 5 enter for free.

sections.heading: Thermal Explorer Highway
list: Wairakei Terraces: $25 per adult, $15 per child (5-15 years)
Craters of the Moon: $10 per person, free for kids under 5
Orakei Korako: $39 per adult, $20 per child (5-15 years), free for kids under 5

rows: Hot pools, lazy river, kids' area

sections.heading: Free and Low-Cost Options
sections.body: For a budget-friendly option, consider the free Otumuheke Stream hot pool, located near the Spa Thermal Park. Alternatively, the Taupo Hot Springs Spa Resort offers a $10 entry fee for its hot pool area.

sections.heading: Drive Times and Distances
list: AC Baths to Wairakei Terraces: 10 minutes, 10km
Taupo town centre to Craters of the Moon: 15 minutes, 15km
Taupo town centre to Orakei Korako: 30 minutes, 30km

sections.heading: Plan Your Family Trip to Taupo

cta.text: Get started with our NZ family travel budget calculator

sections.heading: Accommodation Options in Taupo
sections.body: Taupo offers a range of accommodation options, from budget-friendly motels to luxury resorts. For a family-friendly stay, consider booking a campervan through our partner website, with prices starting from $100 per night.
